title: A Real Makefile With Dependencies
description:
## Targets That Depend on Each Other

**Your task:** create **`/root/Makefile`** that:
1. defines a variable **`IMAGE = myapp`**
2. declares **`.PHONY`** for its targets
3. has a **`build`** target that prints **`building myapp`** (use the variable)
4. has a **`deploy`** target that **depends on `build`** and prints **`deploying`**

Running `make deploy` must therefore build **then** deploy.

> 💡 Recipe lines need a real TAB — use `printf` with `\t`. Prerequisites go after the colon: `deploy: build`.

hints.title: Variables, .PHONY and prerequisites
hints.body: Reference the variable as $(IMAGE). A target's prerequisites (after the colon) run first. @ hides the command echo.

validation.description: Checks that 'make deploy' builds (with the variable) then deploys.

commands.description: Build step prints the image name from the variable
